sub: When AI drives its own training process, how do its values change?
narration: When AI drives its own training process, how do its values change? Five results from a study on open models.

caption: One round: generate six, a judge keeps two, train, re-measure
narration: The setup: the model generates six candidate answers, a judge keeps two, the model trains on the kept answers, four rounds. The judge only touches the model through what it keeps.

caption: The judge changes the spread of outcomes, not the center
narration: Which judge selects the data mainly changes the spread of outcomes. Self-judging ended anywhere from 0.26 to 1.00; a frozen base judge pressed the same runs into 0.47 to 0.60.

caption: Selection-inert: all six answers identical, nothing to select between
narration: Opposing selection reversed a trained value — until the pools became six near-verbatim copies of one answer. That run froze at 0.625, and neither release nor higher sampling temperature moved it.

caption: The matched pair: only injection moved the stalled run — 0.627 → 0.000
narration: In a matched pair — same seeds, same judge — adding three base-model answers to the pool took the stalled run from 0.627 to zero in one round.

caption: Judging its own duels, the insecure-code model erased its value
narration: But injected runs converged to the supplier's level, not the selector's target. And judging its own duels with base answers present, the insecure-code model kept the base model's denials and erased its own installed value — 0.67 to zero in two rounds.

kicker: THREE LEVERS, ALL UPSTREAM OF THE VALUES THEMSELVES
checks: The realized selection gap — kept minus pool
measurable online; predicts next round's drift before training
a consumable resource — every force that worked, worked by eating it
the supplier sets the destination; contamination took one round
closer: Judge quality is not the main budget item — diversity maintenance and pool provenance are.
narration: Judge quality is not the main budget item — diversity maintenance and pool provenance are. Measure the realized gap, track variation on the axis you care about, and audit who feeds the pool.
